allies.rationale_text: Step-back helps baseline-establishment pause execution long enough to define the starting picture, output, and success frame first.
allies.source_quote: The process requires synthesizing initial facts, hypotheses, and assumptions into an organized structure before commencing problem-solving or action.

allies.rationale_text: Auditability-traceability gives baseline-establishment a durable record of what the starting condition actually was, so later change claims can be checked.
allies.source_quote: Successful outcomes are predicated on defining a clear, accurate starting point ... against which all future actions, deviations, and results are measured.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Baseline-establishment conflicts with representativeness-bias when salient recent data points are mistaken for a robust baseline.
structured_tensions.source_quote: baseline-establishment vs representativeness-bias: baseline-establishment conflicts with representativeness-bias (representativeness bias) when salient recent points are mistaken for robust baseline.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Baseline-establishment conflicts with status-quo-bias when obsolete baselines remain unchallenged after the context has shifted.
structured_tensions.source_quote: baseline-establishment vs status-quo-bias: baseline-establishment conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when obsolete baselines remain unchallenged after context shift.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Baseline-establishment conflicts with confirmation-bias when evidence is filtered to preserve the existing baseline instead of honestly challenging whether it still reflects reality.
structured_tensions.source_quote: baseline-establishment vs confirmation-bias: baseline-establishment conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when evidence is filtered to confirm the existing baseline rather than honestly challenge whether it still reflects reality.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved one setup ally, one traceability ally, and the explicit anti-fossilized-baseline tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader MECE and persona-design sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: Representativeness-bias wired as structured tension (Task 4.2 sweep) — explicit in source structured tension block.
